docs.title: Welcome to the UArizona DataLab Github!
Spring 2024 Workshops
docs.text:
Are you interested in improving your professional skills in data analytics tools, methods, scientific analysis and statistics?

The UArizona DataLab team invites you to attend our weekly Workshops. All sessions are conducted in hybrid mode. Please join us in-person at the Weaver Science & Engineering Library Room 212, or join via Zoom:864 2322 3879

docs.title: Notes and code repositories
docs.text:
• Craking the Coding Interview
  • Data Science Tapas
  • Introduction Classical Machine Learning
  • Introduction to Data Engineering Technologies
  • Introduction to Data Science
  • Introduction to Deep Learning
  • Introduction to NextGen Geospatial Data Science

docs.title: Schedule for Spring 2024
docs.text: Workshops When Cracking the Coding Interview Mon, Wed, and Fri 4-5pm Data Engineering Mondays 2-3pm (Jan 29 - Mar 25) Intro to Graph Machine Learning Mondays 2-3pm (Apr 01 - Apr 29) NextGen Geospatial Data Science Tuesdays 2-3pm Intro to Data Science Tuesdays 3-4pm Data Science Tapas Wednesdays 1-2pm Classical Machine Learning Thursdays 2-3pm Intro to Deep Learning Thursdays 3-4pm

Please visit the UArizona Data Science Institute Events Calendar for more detailed information.

UArizona DataLab, is a strategic partnership between the University of Arizona's: Data Science Institute, and the Institute for Computation & Data-Enabled Insight.

Sponsor organizations

docs.title: About
docs.text: The UArizona DataLab is an effective organizational structure of a collaboration between the University of Arizona's: Data Science Institute and the Institute for Computation & Data-Enabled Insight for fostering and accelerating research in applied Data Science by providing access to expertise, data, collaboration, advanced infrastructure, and training opportunities.
